description: Process a cash sale in Chromis POS. The POS terminal is open and logged in with the product catalog loaded (200 real UK retail products from the UCI Online Retail Dataset). You need to: (1) Find and add 'White Hanging Heart T-Light Holder' (the most popular item, priced at £3.11) to the sale, (2) Add 'Regency Cakestand 3 Tier' (priced at £13.81) to the sale, (3) Complete the sale by processing a cash payment. The receipt should show both items with correct prices and the total including 8% sales tax.
